title: 10 best herbal tinctures for tooth decay
description: Fennel tinctures helps with tooth decay because of its natural antibacterial properties, which help to combat the growth of bacteria that can cause cavities. The tannins and flavonoids present in fennel also have astringent properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and strengthen the gums.
